faq_specs.question: What does hypoallergenic mean for a baby mattress?
faq_specs.answer: Hypoallergenic means the materials are unlikely to cause allergic reactions.

faq_specs.question: Is the cover waterproof?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. The cover is fully waterproof, protecting the foam from spills and moisture busupportup.

faq_specs.question: What age is this mattress suitable for?
faq_specs.answer: Designed for babies and toddlers between 0 and 3 years of age.

faq_specs.question: Is this mattress safe for newborns?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. The mattress is made with certified, non-toxic, hypoallergenic materials.

faq_specs.answer: The mattress has a thickness of 4 inches (102 mm).

faq_specs.question: What materials are used?
faq_specs.answer: The mattress features high density foam with a hypoallergenic terry cotton cover.

faq_specs.question: What is the AirGen™ Memory Foam?
faq_specs.answer: AirGen™ is a 100% open-cell memory foam with enhanced breathability. The open-cell structure keeps air circulating through the foam, reducing heat busupportup.

faq_specs.question: What feel is the Original Mattress?
faq_specs.answer: Medium feel. The perfect balance between soft and firm.

faq_specs.question: How do I determine which height of the mattress is perfect for me?
faq_specs.answer: If you're 60-80 kg, an 8-inch mattress is recommended. For over 80 kg, opt for a 10-inch mattress.

faq_specs.question: How long does the Original take to expand?
faq_specs.answer: The Original takes about 48-hours to expand fully.

faq_specs.question: What is high-resilience foam?
faq_specs.answer: High-resilience (HR) foam bounces back quickly when pressure is released, maintaining its shape and support over time. It's more durable and responsive than standard foam, making it ideal for regular use.

faq_specs.question: What surfaces can I use it on?
faq_specs.answer: The anti-skid base keeps the mattress stable on any flat surface, whether it is a floor, wooden planks, a low cot frame, or a compact bed base.

faq_specs.question: Does it come with a washable cover?
faq_specs.answer: No, but the fabric cover is easy to clean. Spot clean with a msupport detergent and damp cloth. Avoid soaking.

faq_specs.question: Can I use this mattress daily?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. The 4-inch high-resilience foam is designed for regular use and provides consistent support over time. It's ideal for floor sleeping, a cot, or as a semi-permanent guest bed setup.

products.notes_observed: Single-layer construction (only HR foam). Shortest warranty in mattress lineup (1 year vs 10). Double SKU pricing not visible without variant select.

faq_specs.question: What kind of sleeper is the Cloud Pillow meant for?
faq_specs.answer: The Cloud Pillow is good for all kinds of sleepers. Front, back, side, or any other sleeping position you prefer.

faq_specs.question: How is the Cloud Pillow adjustable?
faq_specs.answer: With a discrete zipper, you get to adjust the height of the pillow.

faq_specs.question: What is the difference between microfiber and memory foam?
faq_specs.answer: Microfiber pillows are resilient and provide overall support, whereas memory foam contours to the head but is firmer.

faq_specs.question: Is Microfiber Fill better than a down alternative?
faq_specs.answer: Microfiber is dense, giving a soft feel, is cruelty-free, and easier to care for.

faq_specs.question: What are the benefits of Luxe Modal Fabric?
faq_specs.answer: Luxe Modal is soft, breathable, durable, and hypoallergenic.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by hyperextension?
faq_specs.answer: It enables your neck muscles to stretch and provides relief.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by neutral spine position?
faq_specs.answer: It's where your head and neck are aligned under the least stress.

faq_specs.answer: SleepyCat's Contour Latex Pillow has dual height options i.e. it has unique curves that aligns with the natural curvature of your spine, alleviating pressure points.

faq_specs.question: What is the lifespan of this pillow?
faq_specs.answer: Natural Latex Pillows are highly durable and can last for about 7-10 years.

products.description_short: Super comfy cervical pillow with dual height options, designed to reduce pressure on your head & neck. This pillow is made with real memory foam that doesn't sag or flatten.

faq_specs.question: What are the benefits of the dual loft options?
faq_specs.answer: The Contour Pillow is crafted in a way to have dual loft options, so you can choose your comfort. The higher loft keeps the neck and spine aligned for side sleepers while the lower loft perfectly cradles the shoulders and the neck for back sleepers.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by hyperextension?
faq_specs.answer: The Contour Pillow is made to hyperextend your neck. What this means is it enables your neck muscles to stretch, and provides relief so you can fully relax.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by neutral spine position?
faq_specs.answer: The neutral spine position is your spine's favourite position. It's the position where your head and neck are aligned, and where they're both under the least amount of stress.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by neutral spine position?

faq_specs.question: What is the purpose of a body pillow?
faq_specs.answer: Body pillow is made with moms-to-be in mind. They support your back and make it easier to sleep on your side, which may be more comfortable after 20 weeks.

faq_specs.question: Which shaped pillow is best during pregnancy?
faq_specs.answer: An I or U-shaped quality body pillow can improve the alignment of your spine, back, and hips.

faq_specs.question: Is pregnancy body pillow helpful in pregnancy for back pain?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, they help reduce back pain during pregnancy to a large extent.

faq_specs.question: How is a natural latex mattress topper different from memory foam?
faq_specs.answer: A natural latex mattress topper feels more responsive and slightly bouncy, making it easier to move. Unlike memory foam, it doesn't sink deeply and offers a more balanced, on-the-surface feel.

faq_specs.question: Is natural latex mattress topper good for hot sleepers?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, natural latex is naturally breathable. Its open structure and pinhole design allow better airflow.

faq_specs.question: What's the best thickness for a mattress topper?
faq_specs.answer: The best thickness for a mattress topper usually ranges between 2 to 4 inches. Thinner toppers (2 inches) are great for slight comfort upgrades, while thicker ones (3-4 inches) provide deeper cushioning and support.

faq_specs.question: How do I choose the right mattress topper?
faq_specs.answer: To choose the right mattress topper, consider your mattress type and what it lacks - too firm, uneven, or lacking support.

products.description_short: Designed to instantly add plush softness and smooth out firmness without changing your mattress.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Dry clean only.

faq_specs.question: Can I wash a microfiber mattress topper?
faq_specs.answer: Most microfiber mattress toppers are not machine washable and are best dry cleaned to maintain their softness and structure.

faq_specs.question: Is microfiber the same as memory foam?
faq_specs.answer: No, microfiber and memory foam are very different. Microfiber is soft and cushiony, while a Memory Foam Mattress Topper adapts to your body to provide support and pressure relief.

faq_specs.question: What are jersey bed sheets?
faq_specs.answer: Jersey bed sheets are made from a knit fabric, akin to T-shirt material. The result is a stretchy, soft, and breathable sheet.

faq_specs.question: Are jersey sheets suitable for all seasons?
faq_specs.answer: Jersey sheets are versatile, offering comfort in warmer months with breathability and warmth in cooler weather due to their insulating properties.

faq_specs.question: What are jersey pillow covers?
faq_specs.answer: Jersey pillow covers, akin to T-shirt material, are crafted from a knit fabric blend of cotton and synthetic fibers, providing a soft, stretchy, and comfortable surface for pillows.

faq_specs.question: Do jersey pillow covers come in different sizes?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, jersey pillow covers come in various sizes, including Standard, King, and Cuddle, accommodating different pillow dimensions for a proper fit.

faq_specs.question: What does 200 thread count mean in bedsheets?
faq_specs.answer: A 200 thread count means there are 200 threads woven per square inch, offering the ideal balance of breathability, durability, and comfort for percale sheets.

faq_specs.question: Is this bedsheet suitable for hot weather or summer?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, percale cotton is lightweight and highly breathable, making it perfect for warm weather and hot sleepers.

faq_specs.question: Is this fitted bedsheet wrinkle-free?
faq_specs.answer: Percale sheets have a natural crisp finish and may wrinkle slightly, which is part of their classic, hotel-like look.

faq_specs.question: Why should I choose a sateen fitted bedsheet over other fabrics?

faq_specs.question: What is a wedge pillow used for?
faq_specs.answer: A wedge pillow supports the head, back, or legs at an incline. It improves posture, eases acid reflux, and relieves back pain.

faq_specs.question: Can it help with snoring?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. Sleeping elevated keeps airways open, therefore reducing snoring and helping with msupport sleep apnea.

faq_specs.answer: The orthopedic dog bed uses high-density foam that evenly distributes weight, helping reduce pressure on joints and supporting muscles for more restful sleep.

faq_specs.question: Is the SleepyCat orthopedic dog bed suitable for senior dogs?
faq_specs.answer: Absolutely. Designed to provide enhanced support, especially comfortable for senior dogs or those with mobility concerns.

products.notes_observed: vs Original Dog Bed: 4" HD foam (solid) instead of 2" shredded foam. Targets senior/joint-issue dogs. Higher weight capacity (up to 45kg vs 25kg).

products.description_short: A stylish motorised recliner with smooth one-touch motion, built-in charging, and ergonomic support in a compact frame.

faq_specs.question: Does the recliner have a charging port?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, it features a built-in USB-C port, so you can conveniently charge your phone or devices while you relax.

faq_specs.question: How does the one-touch recline function work?
faq_specs.answer: The Enso Recliner comes with a motorised mechanism that lets you adjust your position smoothly with just the push of a button.

products.description_short: This sleek and sturdy Mango wood bed with a plush headboard is the perfect blend of aesthetics, comfort, and durability.

faq_specs.question: What are the benefits of mango wood?
faq_specs.answer: Mango wood offers multiple premium benefits: exceptional durability, natural resistance to water and termites, beautiful grain patterns, and eco-friendly sustainability.

products.description_short: A 100% Solid Mango Wood Bed — durable and withstands whatever pressure you put on it.

faq_specs.question: How much weight can the Ohayo Bed handle?
faq_specs.answer: The Ohayo bed can withstand over 420kg of weight.

faq_specs.question: How to assemble the Ohayo Bed?
faq_specs.answer: You receive complimentary bed installation with your purchase or can use the provided instruction manual for easy assembly.

products.notes_observed: All-wood (no fabric headboard) vs [[katachi-bed]] which has Molfino headboard. Cheaper (₹18.7k vs ₹24.6k).

products.description_short: A stylish manual recliner built for everyday lounging. Space-efficient and upholstered in easy-clean premium leatherette.

faq_specs.question: Is the Seika Recliner manual or motorized?
faq_specs.answer: This is a manual recliner, designed for smooth and easy operation without the need for power or wiring.

faq_specs.question: Does the recliner require assembly after delivery?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, this recliner chair comes with a DIY assembly setup that's simple and quick to put together.

products.notes_observed: Manual mechanism vs [[enso-recliner]]'s motorised. ₹22,312 vs ₹37,399 (Enso). Half the weight (20kg vs 40.5kg) — smaller frame.

products.product_name: Taurus Smart Recliner Bed With Headboard
products.description_short: Experience intelligent sleep with customisable positions, one-touch presets, and premium comfort features in this advanced electric bed.
products.frame_material: High-quality steel with black powder coating

faq_specs.question: Does the bed come with pre-set positions?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, pre-set positions like zero-gravity and anti-snore are available.

faq_specs.question: What is the weight capacity of the bed?
faq_specs.answer: The bed can support up to 300 kg, depending on the size.

products.notes_observed: Most expensive product in the catalog. Includes 2 USB ports + zero-gravity + anti-snore. Note: og:price showed ₹55,249 but schema returned ₹72,249 — possibly base/current price differ from variant pricing.
